subject: English
title: Anandi’s Rainbow

sections.heading: Anandi’s Rainbow
sections.content:
Let us read
It was raining outside.
Anandi was fast asleep
dreaming of rainbows.
She woke up to look
out of her window.
There was a huge,
bright rainbow across a
clear blue sky.
Anandi ran out to the
garden with Milli, her
favourite cat.
Anandi loved to draw
and paint. Today, she
wanted to paint the
flowers of her garden
with the colours of the
rainbow.
Chapter 2
Anandi’s Rainbow
Reprint 2026-27
116Mridang
And lo! There were
beautiful flowers all
over the garden. The
Sun was up there
shining in its yellow
glory.
After giving colours
to the flowers and the
Sun, the rainbow was
gone……
She coloured one
flower with violet,
and another with
the indigo of the
rainbow. One with
the blue and leaves
with the green….
One with orange….
One with red….
But she left the
yellow so that the
Sun may look bright
and gay.
Reprint 2026-27
117Mridang
1. Have you seen a rainbow?
2. When did you see it?
3. Where did you see it?
4. What is the colour of the sky during sunrise and sunset?
1. Go outside and look at the sky.
2. Do you see the clouds?
3. What shapes do you see in the clouds?
4. Draw what you see in the clouds.
Note to the teacher
• Encourage every child to express what they see.
Let us do
Let us speak
5. Watch the sky at sunrise, sunset and at night. Share your
experience with the class.

learningObjectives: Understand the key concepts of Anandi’s Rainbow
Identify and explain the main ideas covered in this chapter
